name: Multi-Chem Limited
summary: Multi-Chem Limited, an investment holding company, distributes information technology products in Singapore, the People's Republic of China, Australia, and internationally. It operates in two segments, PCB Business and IT Business. The company provides distributes hardware and software relating to internet and network products, as well as related installation, technical, and maintenance services. In addition, it offers PCB manufacturing services, such as precision drilling services to PCB fabricators. Further, the company distributes a range of specialty chemicals for surface treatment, electroless copper plating, tin/tin lead stripping, and micro-etching; and supplies PCB-related materials and equipment, including plating systems, pulse rectifiers for copper plating, copper and tin anodes for electroplating, entry and back-up materials for drilling, non-woven brushes, dry film and liquid photoresist products, CCL and prepreg products, tacky rollers, tack cloth/wipes, and cleaning machines to remove foreign particles on PCBs. Additionally, it rents machines, as well as offers software consultancy and implementation services; and IT training courses. Multi-Chem Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Singapore.
